Food & Drink · iPhone · iOS 17+

Kamado Companion

Master fire. Create flavor.

The complete cooking companion for your kamado BBQ — 65+ recipes, smart timers and a planner that tells you exactly when to light the fire.

Coming soon to the App Store Key features

Free · ad-supported

About

What is Kamado Companion?

Kamado Companion is built for ceramic grill cooking — Kamado Joe, Big Green Egg, The Bastard or any other kamado. Every one of its 65+ recipes is written specifically for the kamado, with dome and core temperatures in Celsius, European measurements and honest, step-by-step instructions.

The BBQ planner works backwards from the moment you want to eat: it calculates when to start prepping, when to light the kamado and when the food goes on — and reminds you at fire-up time. Up to four named cook timers keep running even when the app is closed.

A searchable temperature guide covers 35+ cuts, a private cook diary lets you photograph and rate your own creations, and a smart shopping list groups ingredients by supermarket aisle. All of it works fully offline, in English and Dutch.

A closer look

Inside the app

Key features

Built around what matters

65+ complete recipes

From reverse-sear ribeye and 14-hour brisket to wood-fired pizza and desserts — every recipe written for the kamado.

BBQ planner

Pick a recipe and a serving time. The app calculates your whole timeline and reminds you exactly when to light up.

Four cook timers

Named timers for ribs, sauce, corn — and the beer you promised yourself. They keep notifying even when the app is closed.

Temperature guide

Dome temperature, core temperature, method and resting time for 35+ cuts — from steak rare to pulled pork.

Private cook diary

Photograph, rate and keep notes on your own cooks. Stored on your device only.

Smart shopping list

One tap adds a recipe’s ingredients to a list grouped by supermarket category.

Who it’s for

Made for people like you

  • Kamado owners — Kamado Joe, Big Green Egg, The Bastard or any ceramic grill
  • Low-and-slow enthusiasts cooking brisket, ribs and pulled pork
  • Weekend grillers who want exact temperatures instead of guesswork
  • Anyone who has ever lit the fire too late for dinner

Kamado Companion is almost here

Currently in final testing. Want to know the moment it launches? Drop us a line.

Notify me at launch

Privacy

How Kamado Companion treats your data

All data stays on your device. No account, no analytics. Free and supported by ads.

Data collection

The current version collects no personal data. Recipes, favorites, timers, plans, diary photos and shopping lists are stored only on your device.

Advertising

Kamado Companion is free and supported by advertising. If ad personalisation is introduced, iOS will ask for your permission first via App Tracking Transparency, and this policy will be updated before that release.

Analytics

No analytics or tracking SDKs are included.

Accounts

No account or login is required — all functionality is available immediately.

Storage

Everything is stored locally on your iPhone. Diary photos are never uploaded. Deleting the app deletes your data.

Privacy questions

Email support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com — or read the full privacy policy for Kamado Companion.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Is Kamado Companion free?

Yes — completely free, supported by ads. No subscriptions, no paywalls, no locked recipes.

Does the app work offline?

Yes. All recipes, timers, the planner and the temperature guide work without an internet connection.

Is my data stored or shared?

Everything is stored on your device only. Photos in your cook diary are never uploaded.

Are there ads?

Yes — the app is free and ad-supported. Ads never block recipes or features.

Do I need an account?

No. There is no login and no sign-up — everything works immediately.

Which devices are supported?

Kamado Companion is designed for iPhone and requires iOS 17 or later. It is available in English and Dutch, following your iOS language.

Does it work with my grill?

Yes — recipes are written for any ceramic kamado-style grill: Kamado Joe, Big Green Egg, The Bastard and others.

How do I get support?

Email support@amsterdamfuturelabs.com and we will get back to you within two business days.

Support

Need a hand with Kamado Companion?

Questions, bug reports, feature ideas — we read everything and aim to reply within two business days.
